properties.Test Case: Test Copy Hyperlink feature (right-click on page thumbnail). The first time you use the feature in a book, you get this message. Select some text and paste the hyperlink, then ensure it works correctly in Publish:BloomPUB Preview. Copy hyperlink of a different page. This time you shouldn't get the message.
properties.Steps: Test Copy Hyperlink feature (right-click on page thumbnail). The first time you use the feature in a book, you get this message. Select some text and paste the hyperlink, then ensure it works correctly in Publish:BloomPUB Preview. Copy hyperlink of a different page. This time you shouldn't get the message.

properties.Test Case: try pasting in a hyperlink into selected text in all of the following situations: text which crosses paragraphs; text which crosses over audio segments; portions of formatted text, i.e. not encapsulating the beginning and end points in the .htm marking. Should get a message like this. Try several times to do this. The warning message should repeat. Click on "Learn More" and ensure the link works.
properties.Steps: - try pasting in a hyperlink into selected text in all of the following situations: text which crosses paragraphs; text which crosses over audio segments; portions of formatted text, i.e. not encapsulating the beginning and end points in the .htm marking. Should get a message like this. Try several times to do this. The warning message should repeat. Click on "Learn More" and ensure the link works.
